allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\sapir\\Desktop\\bank-leumi-sapir"; $orgInfo = \(sf org display --target-org my-scratch-org-2 --json 2>&1\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $orgInfo.result.accessToken; $url = $orgInfo.result.instanceUrl; Write-Host "URL: $url"; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/services/data/v62.0/sobjects/Customer__c/describe" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET; Write-Host "Fields returned: $\($resp.fields.Count\)"; $resp.fields | Where-Object { $_.custom -eq $true } | Select-Object name, type | Format-Table)
